debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
lt : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w✝ : ℕ
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
c : Circuit p (ZMod p)
h : rw_bisim c.eval (Clap.Cs.eval p lt (Clap.to_cs p lt (ZMod p) c))
args : Vector (ZMod p) w✝
w : ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w✝
⊢ ¬(Clap.assert_bits p lt w✝ args = true ∧ e.eval = Clap.bits2num p lt w✝ args)

failed_attempts:
(try decide) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [assert_bits, bits2num_e, bits2num, Vector.foldl, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>
      (try norm_cast at *) <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [assert_bit_e, Exp.eval, Cs.eval, denotation.n]
          <;>
          (try decide) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try ring_nf at *) <;>
          (try norm_cast at *) <;>
          (try omega)
        })
